title: East London, Eastern Cape — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to East London, Eastern Cape: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

East London is a city in Eastern Cape with a population of 267,000. A port city on the Sunshine Coast, known for its beaches, river estuary, and automotive manufacturing.

Last updated: July 14, 2026
